title: hieracium portae
intro: Hieracium portae, also known as Hieracium aurense or mouse-ear hawkweed, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion family. The medicinal properties of Hieracium portae lie in its ability to act as an antiseptic and anti-inflammatory agent, making it useful in treating wounds and reducing inflammation. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and promote wound healing. Hieracium portae can be prepared into herbal remedies such as infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be used topically or orally to harness its medicinal properties.
